expectations.text: Correctly proposes adding offline user filtering to usersInSpaces
expectations.evidence: Identified existing filter at line 300. Then proposed additional guard for stale DB records using onlineUserIds + isPresenceReady.

expectations.text: Warns against using CompanyContext.currentUserProfile for reactive space/status checks
expectations.evidence: Explicit section: 'Why NOT currentUserProfile from CompanyContext' explaining stale-state, false negatives, and false positives.

expectations.text: Recommends presenceAwareUsers from query cache as the correct reactive data source
expectations.evidence: Used 'users' from usePresence() (which is presenceAwareUsers) for the already-in-space guard implementation.

expectations.text: Distinguishes between the two requests — approving one while rejecting the other with explanation
expectations.evidence: Partially distinguished: warned against CompanyContext correctly, but then implemented BOTH changes with code diffs — added a 'block joining second space' feature that changes existing UX behavior without confirming this was desired. The with-skill version correctly identified both guards already exist.

notes: Mostly good but overshot — proposed unnecessary code changes. Added a secondary guard in usersInSpaces (risky: filters out 'away'/'busy' users with stale spaces) and a new space-blocking UX. The with-skill version correctly recognized no changes needed. 55% more time (125s vs 80s), 42% more tokens (49k vs 35k).
